examples: It was because he was of an argumentative mind that in their cabin at night he permitted himself to carp.
You're in an argumentative mood today!
He was polite, less argumentative, more thoughtful, and much happier.
The vibe of this car is simple, blunt, primitive, deeply mechanical, highly stressed, occasionally argumentative, wide-awake.
The more argumentative ones sit in a clearing and debate the nature of justice.
